page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g5ne.xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 4 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture, utilizing an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at a clock speed of 2.5 GHz. The processor includes 32 KB of L1d cache, 1.0 MB of L2 cache, and 33 MB of L3 cache, with support for AVX, AVX-512F, AES, BMI2, ADX, and FMA instruction sets. The instance is configured with 16.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, and it operates with a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Benchmark evaluations place the performance of the ecs.g5ne.xlarge in the lower tiers. Stress-ng single-core and multi-core CPU tests rank in the bottom 25 percent, while Geekbench single-core and multi-core scores fall into the bottom 10 percent. Memory bandwidth tests indicate a read-only large block speed of 19.5 GB/sec and a write large block speed of 18.08 GB/sec. Computational tasks such as gzip compression and bzip3 decompression also register in the bottom 10 percent of tested instances. For specialized workloads, the instance achieves 2.96 million operations per second on Redis SET benchmarks and a static web serving throughput of 2.32 GB/sec.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.g5ne.xlarge offers a standard resource density of 4 vCPUs to 16 GB RAM, making it a candidate for legacy workloads that require dedicated CPU allocation without demanding high-performance throughput. The primary tradeoff is its low benchmark-per-resource efficiency, as its older Intel Xeon architecture underperforms relative to modern hardware classes. This instance is best suited for low-intensity general-purpose workloads, basic web serving, lightweight database operations, and development or testing environments that do not require high-speed memory bandwidth or local NVMe storage.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g5ne.xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose instance featuring 4 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz. It is equipped with 16.0 GB of RAM, providing a balanced 4.0 GB per core, but lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, it provides a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps. Performance benchmarks consistently place this instance in the lower percentiles, with Geekbench scores in the bottom 10 percent and stress-ng CPU performance in the bottom 25 percent. Memory bandwidth is also limited, with large block reads at 19.5 GB/sec. Given its legacy hardware profile and lower performance-per-resource efficiency, the ecs.g5ne.xlarge is best suited for low-demand general-purpose applications, basic web serving, and development environments where dedicated CPU allocation is required but high computational throughput is not critical.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g5ne.xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 4 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 16 GB RAM, and 2 Gbps network bandwidth, delivering entry-level performance for basic workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g5ne.xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 4 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and KVM-based virtualization.
tagline: A dedicated general-purpose instance with balanced memory-to-CPU allocation for low-intensity workloads and legacy application hosting.
bullet_points: 4 dedicated physical Intel Xeon 8163 cores at 2.5 GHz
16.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB per core
2 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage
KVM hypervisor virtualization on x86_64 architecture
Suited for low-intensity web serving, basic databases, and testing
